deviations.summary: User requested 3 runs (Tue/Thu/Sat) instead of plan v4.0's 1 run (Sat). Coach pushed back twice — first on volume (deload should reduce running too), then on intensity when user cited 'Z2 burns most fat'. Z2 has peak fat OXIDATION rate (g/min) but total fat LOSS depends on 24h caloric balance, not exercise fuel mix. User proceeded with 3 runs Z2. Final: 3km × 3 = 9km Z2 (-38% vs W18 14.5km Z2-Z3). Constraint: HR strict 131-143, no creep into Z3 like 5/01 (146 bpm). Outcomes evaluated next /weekly-review — if HRV/readiness/RHR worse Mon 5/12 vs Mon 5/05, this is the cause.
